description: Style Notewildcraft, the outdoor experts, give you this raincoat with unique styling which makes it easy to wear and carry. Waterproof, breathable, water repellent and wind proof - this coat is an essential on your outdoor adventures or when you are out braving the rains. Easy to pack, compact and lightweight, carrying it with you is no hassle. Product DetailsBlack rain coat, has a hood with toggle straps, zipper in front with a flap with velcro closure concealing it, two insert pockets with flaps and velcro closure above the hemline and long sleeves with elasticated cuffsMaterial and CareBlendedMachine wash coldDo not tumble dry, dry clean or ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size MPlease note that the thread colour in the brand logo may vary from the image shown
